text:
VERDICT: LIKELY
EXPLANATION: The arXiv ID 2505.24871 corresponds to a real paper titled "MoDoMoDo: Multi-Domain Data Mixtures for Multimodal LLM Reinforcement Learning" by Yiqing Liang et al. (10 authors). The cited title ("Modomodo: Learning mixture-of-datasets with reinforcement learning for multimodal reasoning"), cited authors (Tian Liang, Xiaoyuan Liu, Pinjia He, Haitao Mi, Zhaopeng Tu, Dong Yu), and author count (6) are all completely wrong — none of the cited authors appear in the real paper.
LINK: https://arxiv.org/abs/2505.24871
